items.text:
STOP PHOTOCOPYING YOUR GHANA CARD — IT'S NOW A CRIMINAL OFFENCE. 🪪

The NIA has gazetted new rules: biometric verification is now the ONLY lawful way to verify a Ghana Card for any transaction.

That photocopy the office, the bank agent, or the SIM seller asks for? Now illegal — for them to demand and for anyone to make. Visual inspection for transactions is out too.

The fines are real: GH¢6,000 to GH¢24,000 for institutions, GH¢600 to GH¢6,000 for individuals.

Why? The NIA says photocopied cards are fueling identity theft.

(Source: Graphic Online | Pulse | Adomonline | MyNewsGH)
#GreaterNews #Ghana #GhanaCard #NIA

Has anyone asked YOU for a Ghana Card photocopy this week? 👇

Photocopying a Ghana Card for transactions is now a criminal offence — biometric verification is the only lawful check under newly gazetted NIA rules. Fines up to GH¢24,000 for institutions. (Source: Graphic/Pulse) #GreaterNews #Ghana #GhanaCard

PLOT TWIST: QUEIROZ ISN'T GOING ANYWHERE. ⚽🇬🇭

After the farewell message, after a week of coach-hunt drama, after Renard said no — Carlos Queiroz is now set to SIGN A NEW TWO-YEAR DEAL as Black Stars coach.

The contract, backed by the GFA and the Sports Ministry, would keep him through the 2027 AFCON — with one mission: end Ghana's 45-year continental title drought.

Sports Minister Kofi Adams says he backs the deal. The man who took Ghana past a World Cup group stage for the first time since 2010 may not be finished after all.

The ink isn't dry yet — signing is expected within days.

(Source: NewsGhana | 3News | Graphic Online)
#GreaterNews #Ghana #BlackStars #Queiroz

Right call or wrong call? Be honest. 👇

U-turn: Carlos Queiroz is set to sign a NEW two-year Black Stars contract through AFCON 2027 — backed by the GFA and Sports Ministry, per multiple reports. Signing expected within days. (Source: NewsGhana/3News/Graphic) #GreaterNews #BlackStars

THE FINAL IS SET: ARGENTINA vs SPAIN. 🏆

Messi did Messi things — two assists in the last stretch as Argentina came from behind to beat England 2-1 in the semifinal.

Spain's route was cleaner: 2-0 over France, with Oyarzabal and Porro on the scoresheet.

So it's the defending champions against the 2010 winners, Sunday in New Jersey. The team that knocked Ghana out is gone — England went out the hard way too.

(Source: NPR | FIFA | Al Jazeera)
#GreaterNews #WorldCup2026 #ArgentinaVsSpain #Ghana

Who lifts it Sunday — Argentina or Spain? 🏆👇

The World Cup final is set: Argentina vs Spain, Sunday in New Jersey. Messi's two late assists turned the semi against England (2-1); Spain saw off France 2-0. Defending champs vs the 2010 winners. (Source: NPR/FIFA) #GreaterNews #WorldCup2026
